title: The Government Buildings Act, 1899
full_text: The Government Buildings Act, 1899 सरकारी इमारत अधिनियम, 1899 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 189904 Act Number: 04 Enactment Date: 1899-02-03 Act Year: 1899 Short Title: The Government Buildings Act, 1899 Hindi Title: सरकारी इमारत अधिनियम, 1899 Long Title: An Act to provide for the exemption from the operation of municipal building laws of certain buildings and lands which are the property, or in the occupation, of the Government and situate within the limits of a municipality. Ministry: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs Enforcement Date: 03-02-1899 Last Updated: 14-01-2019 TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Government Buildings Act, 1899 Show all section Section 1. Short title and extent. Section 2. “Municipal authority” defined. Section 3. Exemption of certain Government buildings from municipal areas to regulate the erection, etc., of buildings within municipalities. Section 4. Objections or suggestions as to erection, etc., of certain Government buildings within municipalities, how to be made and dealt with.
